user.title: Yeelight Bluetooth
user.description: Enter the Yeelight bluetooth name and mac address.

data_description.conf_adapter: This list all bluetooth adapters that have discovered the lamp. The next step will pair this adapter to the lamp.

finish.title: Finishing step
finish.description: All done. The lamp can be paired to a different adapter in the configuration dialog.

progress.wait_pairing: Push the button of the lamp

error.BTLEDisconnectError: Bluetooth connection error while trying to scan. Make sure nothing else is using bluetooth.
error.BTLEManagementError: Could not start a bluetooth scan. It is very likely some permission errors. Follow directions from github repo.

abort.already_configured: Device with same mac address is already configured.
abort.no_devices_found: No devices found during this scan. Ensure the lamp is not connected to another app. Resetting the lamp may help.
abort.pairing_needs_reset: The light needs to be reset to be paired

init.title: Yeelight Bluetooth Options
init.description: Increasing the scan interval to 10 minutes and disabling persistant connections may save battery. Set the bluetooth adapter to 'local' avoid using BTProxy, or pick manually if you have multiple available and want to distribute connection across them.

data.conf_debug_mode: Debug mode. Adds extra entities for debugging.
